title: EVER ADVANCED Luxury Camping Chairs for Adults Heavy Duty Loadable 150kg High Back Oversized Folding Garden Chair Padded 6cm Comfy with Cup Holder Side Pocket Dining Chairs 4-Position Recliner
features: More Convenient: Cup holders and side pockets for easy storage of your cup and mobile phone, or other essentials. Suitable for use in all seasons, whether you are picnic, dining in the garden, lawn parties on the patio, camping or traveling by RV, this high back chair is super comfortable.
Innovative design: 4 positions back adjustable and thanks to the improved folding design, the folded size of this camping chair is smaller than other same chairs, making it easy to carry.

Stability and comfort: the weight of the calf chair can hold up to 150 kg. Powder coated steel and aluminium frame ensure the stability of our folding chair. 69 cm high backrest keeps your head comfortable; the fluffy polyester filling makes the camping chair an extremely comfortable relaxer.

Dimensions: the height of this folding garden chair is 108 cm, seat width: 50 cm, seat depth: 50 cm, back height 69 cm, seat height to floor: 50 cm; the folding size is 30 x 27 x 91 cm and it is only 6.1 kg with a carry bag.
Don't worry: when you buy a EVER ADVANCED camping chair, you will get 1 year product service. We always strive for product quality and customer service as our highest goals.
